failure_surface: Output file contains constraint violations (column values exceed specified maximums) that were not prevented during data manipulation.
root_cause: The agent only validated constraints AFTER completing all modifications and saving the file, rather than enforcing constraints during the adjustment process. Additionally, the agent did not validate whether the initial data already satisfied constraints before beginning operations.
minimal_fix_hypothesis: Add pre-execution validation of input data against constraints, enforce constraint checks BEFORE each cell modification during the loop, and run final validation BEFORE saving the output file.
evidence: Agent logged 'WARNING - Constraint violations found' showing 10 rows with unit4 values of 550.0 exceeding max of 520.0
Validation code block appears AFTER the 'wb_out.save(output_path)' call in the script
Initial dataframe shows all unit4 values at 550.0, which already violates max constraint of 520.0 before any modifications
No constraint validation code exists in the adjustment loops where cells are being modified

memory_items.title: Pre-Execution Constraint Validation
memory_items.lesson: Always validate the initial data state against all specified constraints before beginning any modifications.
memory_items.generalization: Before manipulating spreadsheet data, scan source values against minimum/maximum boundaries to identify pre-existing violations or edge cases.

memory_items.title: In-Process Constraint Enforcement
memory_items.lesson: Enforce constraint boundaries within the modification loop itself, not just as a post-hoc check.
memory_items.generalization: When iteratively updating cell values based on calculations, check each proposed change against relevant constraints before committing it.

memory_items.title: Validation Before Persistence
memory_items.lesson: Run comprehensive validation checks before saving the final output file to disk.
memory_items.generalization: Validate all output dimensions, formula references, and constraint satisfaction before calling the save function to catch errors early.

edits.content:
## 6. Constraint & Boundary Validation
- **Pre-Check**: Scan all input data against specified constraints (min/max ranges) before beginning manipulations.
- **In-Loop Enforcement**: Validate each calculated modification against constraints before applying it, not after completion.
- **Final Validation**: Run comprehensive constraint checks immediately before saving the output file to catch residual errors.
